feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: About Business Partner Supplier Company and Customer Company Credit Memo Payment Terms
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I used OData V2 API: Business Partner (A2X) to do the Create or Update the Business Partner Data

We want to set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms] same with [Payment Terms]

But in this API it has not this [Credit Memo Payment Terms] Schema

Can I ask for, If I set the Schema [Payment Terms] but I have not set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms]

Will there be any impact? Or can I have some [Credit Memo Payment Terms] information to know what does this Schema do?

entry.title: Regarding Unable to Activate with error messages in 'Manage Contract' App
entry.content:
I am writing to inquire about the inability to activate in the 'Manage Contract' app.

While attempting to create and activate a contract using the Manage Contract app, we encountered the following error, preventing successful activation:

" Activation is not possible due to warnings(Posting Term) "

Is this error message raised because of these remained option? (Contract Management APP)

Despite attempting to create the contract with the same details in test tenant, we are unable to determine the root cause of this issue.


I urgently inquire about an issue that needs to be resolved by the end of May.

Could you please provide insight into the cause of this error message? 

Additionally, if there are any steps we can take to resolve this issue, your advice would be greatly appreciated.  We are in great need of your assistance.

entry.title: Creating Kanban barcode EMPTY and FULL with [SAVE] public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I am seeking how I create a barcode with the action to [SAVE]

Something to do with prefix and suffix I suppose? But I do not know how or even if it's possible.

In the process to set the KANBAN container EMPTY/FULL

I create a barcode from 000000001[2] > Kanban ID 000000001 status 2 (EMPTY) > 0000000012

I create a barcode from 000000001[5] > Kanban ID 000000001 status 5 (FULL) > 0000000015

 

When scanning the specific barcode I still need the Button [SAVE] on the APP to Confirm the scanning and to execute the status by hand.

How do I create a barcode that includes the [SAVE] ?

Thank you in advance for your help 🙂

entry.title: Manage Mass Maintenance for custom fields in product master
entry.content:
Does the app Manage Mass Maintenance for Products cover custom fields in product master?

We have added custom fields in the product master on plant level. We would like to understand if all these will be possible to mass update in the app Manage Mass Maintenance for Product Master.

We are using SAP Public Cloud.

entry.title: Mass Reversals or Mass Void of checks in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi I'm trying to void a high number of checks.   With S4Hana Cloud I would use app Manage Outgoing Check to void them but this seems to only allow me to do it one at the time.  Is there another app I could use to void then in batch? Thanks, MC

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Cost estimate for sales order item
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We need to calculate cost estimate for sales order item in Public Cloud Edition system

How can we do that? We couldn't find any available Scop Item related with!

Thank you

entry.title: Actual Activity Price Calculation - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We did cost closing in our QA system, we noticed that in KSII; system calculated control code currency truly (Cost centers EUR amount / activity quantitiy) but second currency converted from end of the period exchange rate.

MY opinion: system have to calculate actual activity unit price in second currency from cost center amount. Exchange rate converter is not true. 

Does it work the same way on your system?

 

Thank you so much

entry.title: Partial Service Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hello All,

At a client they have a need to invoice a service order before all confirmations are completed (multiple invoices throughout the lifecycle of a service order).  In the starter system it is not allowing our team to do this, it only allows us to release for billing once a 'final confirmation' is completed.  Can anyone help point me in the right direction?

#servicemanagement

Thanks, JG

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Credit Management VKM4/VKM5 alternative solution?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

May I know alternative solutions for VKM4/VKM5 in SAP public cloud? Because in DCD (documented credit decision) not show blocked delivery.

We have business requirements for credit management, only credit block for delivery level not for sales order level.

Thanks.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Standard Unit of measurement translations (SSCUI 102179)
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a project in Turkey in which "Turkish" will be login language.

When the login language is "EN", for internal unit of measure "ST", we can see that commercial, technical and text fields are maintained correctly as follows:

When we switch to "TR" language, customizing is as follows and we are not allowed to change it:

A reference image from an on-prem system is as follows. Since we have TR in scope, we believe that is what we need to see when we login in TR and branch to SSCUI 102179

That results us getting a stock report in which we see the unit of measure Piece (PC) as "291" instead of "ADT" when using TR as system language.

Can you please advise on how to proceed?

Thanks in advance,

Bora

entry.title: Automating Purchase Order Creation from Purchase Requisition in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: How can we automatically create a Purchase Order from a Purchase Requisition when the associated Sales Order has a net price less than a certain configurable amount in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? We are aware of the option using iFlows through BTP and APIs, but is there a better way to automate this directly in S/4HANA, given that application jobs do not provide parameters around price?

entry.title: Warehouse management app for inventory overview
entry.content:
Hi 

I just want to check if someone in community have a good app to get an overview of inventory count document in warehouse? For the Inventory management IM count there is the "Manage physical inventory count" but I haven´t managed to find something similar for warehouse count? 

Please let me know if there is some good app to use

Regards

Lisa

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: INTRASTAT - Condition GRWR is determined in pricing but not in the INTRASTAT report.
entry.content:
This request for assistance applies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

It's not possible to determine the Statistical Value in the INTRASTAT report and file. I have checked note 2873326 - KBA: Statistical value is missing in INTRASTAT reporting for countries, but I still can't understand why I am having this issue.

The condition GRWR is correctly determined in the pricing procedure in the billing document but is missing in the INTRASTAT reporting.

I would appreciate it if someone could help.

Best regards.

entry.title: How to extract payment currency details updated for employee Bank information from SAP
entry.content:
Please suggest how to extract payment currency details updated for employee Bank information from SAP.

Currently in case of an employee Transfer or Rehire a new work agreement is created along with new SAP Personnel number and Business Partner. When banking details for the new work agreement are received they are updated against the new Business Partner created and banking data present at the Old business partner (delimited records) is overwritten (wiped out) as we are using the replication API that synchronises SAP records with external system.

There is a requirement from customer to retain/update Banking details for the Old Business Partner as well to pay out the employee expenses. For updating the employee banking information payment currency is a PERSON_NAME field that needs to be input in the API. In order to update banking details for old business partner we need to extract the Banking details from SAP and pass them in the payload.

Using the I_BusinessPartnerBank CDS we could extract Banking details of employee but payment currency was missing here. Could you please confirm how to extract the payment currency details stored for the employee banking information from SAP. Please suggest the suitable CDS Views that need to be used to extract this information from SAP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Table or CDS view for Tax Codes in S4H Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi there, I am looking for Tax (VAT or GST) specific backend CDS view in S4H Public Cloud matching below tables from SAP R3/ECC 6.0 

T007S ---> Tax Code Names

T007A ---> Tax Keys

T007C ---> Groupings for tax codes

IDCFMBRSETX_HST ---> History table for taxation

 

I remember we used to check the Tax Condition Record in KNVH and refer back to these tables with relevance to BSET Tax table from an Accounting Document view. 

 

Is there any way to obtain the corresponding CDS views for above? 

Any help is much appreciated

Regards, Sivasankaran

entry.title: Public cloud - embedded EWM - automatic synchronous goods receipt production WITH automatic packing
entry.content:
Dear community,

Within the synchronous goods receipt process, is it possible to combine following features in 1 process:

  • PP: automatic goods receipt (GR automatically triggered based on confirmation CO11N)
  • PP-EWM: synchronous goods receipt
  • EWM: automatic packing via packing instructions

I have tried all determination records (0GRP, 0RCV, STOC, SHIP, ...) trying to achieve this, but without any success. It's only possible when I deactivate the automatic goods receipt process and perform it manually via MIGO. Then it works. But I would like it to be automated during production order confirmation.

Many thanks for any feedback

Kind regards,

Jens Koyen

entry.title: How to define user authorization for SAC with Public Cloud in Cloud Identity Services?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

We have a SAC system connected to the Public Cloud. In Cloud Identity Services, the user role is Constant and Embedded BI Admin is given. In other words, everyone who has a user in the Public Cloud also has a user in the SAC, and all users have Admin authority.

However, instead, only some users should be defined as SAC users and only a few of these users should be given Admin authority. Is there any way to achieve this?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Line item type 07009 (cumulative interest) not available for asset migration?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am trying to migrate asset postings to S/4HANA Public Cloud. For this purpose, we have activated an additional depreciation area for asset accounting and want to migrate the accumulated interest. According to the XML template file, there is the line item type 07009 for accumulated interest.

I get the message

"Line item type 07009 for cumulated transfer values is invalid".

Is this line item type not supported or did we do anything wrong?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Best regards

Rado

entry.title: Profit Center Hierarchy in Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional
entry.content:
It is not clear how to report on a profit center hierarchy within the Balance Sheet/Income Statement app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
